Site: Ankur Bag Portfolio
Author: Ankur Bag
Role: Full Stack Developer & GenAI Builder
URL: https://www.ankurbag.tech

Summary:
Ankur Bag is a Full Stack Developer specializing in AI-powered web applications and modern web technologies. He builds scalable, high-performance web solutions using Next.js and React, integrating Generative AI and RAG systems.

Skills and Technologies:
Next.js, React, Node.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Generative AI, RAG Systems, Full Stack Web Development.

Experience:
Frontend Developer at Resourcio Pvt Ltd
Web Associate at GDG on Campus RCCIIT

Major Projects:
Cosmic Canvas - AI-powered design tool built with Fabric.js and Generative AI.
Bihaan '25 Website - Official event website for RCCIIT's flagship festival.
GDGC RCCIIT Official Website - Modern portal for Google Developer Groups Community.
Code Reviewer - AI-powered service using Gemini model for automated code feedback.
Attendance Buddy - Tap-to-generate attendance lists for engineering lectures.
Zynor - Cutting-edge Image and Video generation model platform.

Hackathon Achievements:
Hello World Hacks – Best Beginner’s Team
ShowcaseX × Techsprint – Hackathon Winner
Double Slash 4.0 – Hackathon Winner
